Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Tamara Rosselli.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Renee Watkins, is present.
Attorney, Christopher Whitman , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
